top_signals.title: Buyout Bankers Go Big on Debt Pre-Sales to Thwart Fickle Markets
top_signals.summary: Timing can make or break a leveraged debt sale. Get it right, and banks secure cheap financing for their client and maximize fees. Get it wrong, and they can end up with their profits — and reputation — on the line.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lithuanian lawmakers shelter, Vilnius air traffic suspended due to drone incursion
top_signals.summary: A drone violated Lithuanian airspace on Wednesday, the latest in a series of security incidents in the Baltic region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
